body: Some envs were duplicated and not being picked up
title: Fix longruns ClimaComms context

body:
Add precipitation heating term from Raymond 2013 (doi:10.1002/jame.20050). We already take the freezing and melting into account. So we are just adding the temperature gradient term


![Screenshot 2024-06-04 at 3 17 58 PM](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/assets/1196696/c2286a55-9bf4-418d-8a79-46517fbfa46f)
title: Add precip heating terms

body:
This PR makes EDMFX (prognostic and diagnostic) work with 1M microphysics on the GPU. Thank you @charleskawczynski !

@szy21 - I wasn't sure if you would like to also keep the 0M edmf aquaplanet runs in the CI?
title: Test 1M EDMF (diag and prog) on GPU
